ops.title: Replies double-render on iOS for webview-backed blocks (native thread + embedded page)
ops.description: For webview-backed block types (diagram, chart, term, filetree, record), a reply renders twice on iOS: `BoardDerivations.swift:22` shows the native reply thread (it hides threads only for approval/choice/pack) while `web/src/components/BlockRenderer.tsx:59` independently renders the same reply inside the embedded single-block page. Repro: term t1 plus reply {blockId:"t1", md:"done"} shows "done" inside the webview and again beneath it natively. Pre-existing (diagram shipped with this), surfaced during the 2026-07-20 review. Design decision needed: either the single-block page omits reply threads (web change, also affects diagram), or iOS suppresses the native thread for webview-backed types — but the native fallback path still needs replies when the embed fails, so the suppression can't be unconditional.

ops.text: A reply on a webview-backed block renders exactly once on iOS in webview mode
Replies remain visible on iOS when the block is in native-fallback mode (daemon unreachable)
